repo.description: Pure RL to post-train base models for social reasoning capabilities. Lightweight replication of DeepSeek-R1-Zero with Social IQa dataset.

terms.context_snippet: **DeepEnlighten** is a lightweight replication study of the [DeepSeek-R1-Zero](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1) framework. This project investigates the use of **pure reinforcement learning (RL)** without supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to post-train base models for **so…
